parameters.query: SELECT source_suffix2 AS geo, param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue FROM leads WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND source_suffix2 IS NOT NULL AND source_suffix2 != '' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY source_suffix2, param5

INSERT INTO geo_stats (ad_id, country_code, date, shows, clicks, money, postbacks_confirmed_money, roi)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  '{{ $json.country_code }}',
  CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day',
  {{ $json.shows }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.spend }},
  {{ $json.revenue }},
  {{ $json.roi }}
)
ON CONFLICT (ad_id, country_code, date) DO UPDATE SET
  shows = EXCLUDED.shows,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  money = EXCLUDED.money,
  postbacks_confirmed_money = EXCLUDED.postbacks_confirmed_money,
  roi = EXCLUDED.roi;
